results.title: Elon Musk says becoming world’s first quadrillionaire is ‘not impossible’; says Moon and Mars factories must come first
results.description: Elon Musk suggested quadrillionaire status is achievable with lunar and Martian factories, envisioning an economy based on mass and energy. This follows SpaceX's historic $75 billion IPO, valuing the company at over $2.1 trillion and making Musk the world's first trillionaire. SpaceX's vision now includes off-Earth AI manufacturing and lunar industry as steps toward interplanetary economies.
